data_flows.description: Agent or external source submits an enrichment proposal (new triples, axiom changes); the decide endpoint gates it on attribution and consistency
Attributed, approved enrichment written to Oxigraph store via append_derived_summary after gating and OWL 2 EL consistency check
PROV-O provenance is minted only on attributed broker approvals today; general ingest/BC20 crossings do not yet reify triples (see closeout T7)

guides.description: OWL 2 EL profile constraints enforced by Whelk-rs reasoner. Enrichment proposals must not introduce inconsistency.

IS-Envelope schema (ADR-075): canonical envelope for inter-substrate event payloads with version, schema hash, and DID attribution. Vectors are canonical; envelope routing over a mesh transport is not yet implemented in any substrate.

JSON Schema for enrichment proposals: required fields include subject IRI, predicate, object, provenance source, and confidence score. PLANNED — the proposal shape is defined in code (src/handlers/enrichment_proposals_handler.rs + migrations/sqlite/0003_enrichment_proposals.sql) but no standalone JSON Schema fixture exists yet.

12 MCP tools constrain how agents query and propose mutations to the knowledge graph via the ontology bridge (health, search, class_get/list, axiom_add, propose, validate, graph_query, kg_node_search, kg_neighbors, kg_pathfind, ontology_ask)

W3C PROV-O reification emitter (reify_activity): produces an Activity linking wasGeneratedBy, wasAssociatedWith, and used relations. The emitter exists but is currently wired only to attributed broker approvals, not to general ingest (see closeout T7).

sensors.description: Oxigraph SPARQL store health via the trust-status endpoint: query reachability, shapes-loaded count, reasoner status
IS-Envelope test vectors validated against the ADR-075 schema. Fixture parity with downstream consumers verified via SHA-256 checksums.
Enrichment gating: the decide endpoint validates attribution (hex did:nostr), runs the OWL 2 EL consistency path, and only commits a fenced Oxigraph write on attributed approval
Ontology bridge health: the 12 MCP tools respond correctly, the SPARQL proxy reaches Oxigraph, and the propose path enforces the governance gate

PROV-O chain integrity: every enrichment has a complete provenance bead linking agent DID, source event, broker case, and resulting triples. PLANNED — the emitter has unit tests but the end-to-end chain is not yet reified on the ingest path (see closeout T7).
